# API Reference

This is the body of the document. The block above is YAML frontmatter and is
parsed out of the body so the leading `---` does NOT render as a thematic
break. Curated fields appear in the metadata card; `slug` lands in the
"extras" list because it is not part of the curated set.

## Endpoints

- `GET /things` — list everything
- `POST /things` — create a thing
